IApiServerStatePrepareForUnavailableStateAsync Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Puts the server into the PrepareUnavailable state. Once all in-flight requests have been processed, the server enters the Unavailable state.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.ApiManager
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
Task<IDisposable> PrepareForUnavailableStateAsync(
	CancellationToken ct = null
)

Parameters

ct (Optional)
Type: System.ThreadingCancellationToken

Return Value

Type: TaskIDisposable
Remarks
Returns a Disposable that can be used to put the server back into the Running state.
See Also

Reference

IApiServerState Interface
